+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "litmus: \"Failed to get argo pod logs\" is not intuitive",
+    "description": "\"Failed to get argo pod logs\" is not intuitive. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current litmus deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your litmus version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litmus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litmus\nhelm list -n litmus 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working litmus installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review litmus configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant litmus configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n litmus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litmus\nkubectl get configmap -n litmus -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litmus\n```\nWhen we initiate the chaos experiment, `{\"mainLogs\":\"Failed to get argo pod logs\"}` is shown when a workflow is not ready."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for \"Failed to get argo pod logs\" is not intuitive",
+        "description": "when update ChaosExperiment log can't know what is problem. so change error to log message for better debugging\n```yaml\n1 mainLogs: W0102 08:07:39.397356       1 client_config.go:552] Neither --kubeconfig nor --master was specified.  Using the inClusterConfig.  This might not work.\n2 2025/01/02 08:07:39 \n3\n4 ChaosEngine Name : pod-delete-prs65csg\n5\n6 2025/01/02 08:07:39 Created Resource Details: \n7 {pod-delete-prs65csg litmuschaos.io v1alpha1 ChaosEngine litmus }\n8\nW0102 08:07:39.430842       1 client_config.go:552] Neither --kubeconfig nor --master was specified.  Using the inClusterConfig.  This might not work.\n9 2025/01/02 08:07:39 Starting Chaos Checker in 1min\n10 2025/01/02 08:08:39 Checking if Engine Comp\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litmus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litmus\nkubectl get events -n litmus --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"\"Failed to get argo pod logs\" is not intuitive\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "when update ChaosExperiment log can't know what is problem. so change error to log message for better debugging",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "1 mainLogs: W0102 08:07:39.397356       1 client_config.go:552] Neither --kubeconfig nor --master was specified.  Using the inClusterConfig.  This might not work.\n2 2025/01/02 08:07:39 \n3\n4 ChaosEngine Name : pod-delete-prs65csg\n5\n6 2025/01/02 08:07:39 Created Resource Details: \n7 {pod-delete-prs65csg litmuschaos.io v1alpha1 ChaosEngine litmus }\n8\nW0102 08:07:39.430842       1 client_config.go:552] Neither --kubeconfig nor --master was specified.  Using the inClusterConfig.  This might not work.\n9 2025/01/02 08:07:39 Starting Chaos Checker in 1min\n10 2025/01/02 08:08:39 Checking if Engine Completed or Stopped\n11\n12 chaosLogs: [object Object]"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
